# Handoff Rules

Create downstream handoff notes when decommissioning work needs implementation or operational execution.

## To implementation-handoff-desk

Send:

- exact target to retire;
- allowed files and forbidden files;
- migration/cutover sequence;
- validation commands;
- tests and checks required;
- docs and proof updates;
- halt conditions.

## To deployment-desk

Send rollout stages, cutover windows, go/no-go gates, feature flag behavior, monitoring checkpoints, and rollback criteria.

## To release-operations-desk

Send release notes, version/tag impact, user-facing change notes, rollback plan, and post-release verification.

## To verification-desk

Send acceptance gates, proof requirements, test evidence, runtime checks, and blocker criteria.

## To docs-traceability-desk

Send stale docs, API references, runbooks, proof maps, claim maps, and communication records that need update or removal.
